TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Robert Mugabe ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 2, Robert Mugabe, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1924) mrhuw Zimbabwa ta' misuw hya' ga Robert Mugabe, aring ryax tay 22 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 1987 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: roβert muɣaβe rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, roβert muɣaβe, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw zimβaβwa taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa roβert muɣaβe, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
S.FORM: Robert Mugabe ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 2, Robert Mugabe, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1924) mrhuw Zimbabwa ta' misuw hya' ga Robert Mugabe, aring ryax tay 22 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 1987 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: roβert muɣaβe rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, roβert muɣaβe, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw zimβaβwa taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa roβert muɣaβe, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
